programDescription1: The ReFi Colombia Subsidies Program is an initiative that provides periodic subsidies in cCOP (Celo Colombian Peso) to eligible beneficiaries on the Celo network.
programDescription2: Beneficiaries can claim their subsidy at regular time intervals, contributing to financial inclusion and access to decentralized services.
notBeneficiary: Sorry, you are not yet a beneficiary
alreadyClaimed: You already claimed this week's subsidy.
comeBackIn: Come back in {{days}} days to claim again.
claimEveryDays: You can claim your subsidy every {{days}} days.
donationDisclaimer: Remember that this donation is voluntary and cannot be withdrawn.
noCOPm: You don't have COPm. Swap any token to get COPm:
donatedAmount: You donated <bold>{{amount}} cCOP</bold> to the subsidies program.
shareText: I just donated {{amount}} cCOP to the ReFi Colombia subsidies program! {{url}}
swapWidgetError: Could not load the swap widget.
getCOPmDirectly: You can get COPm directly on
